title: Aurora Palm Pals, Woolly The Lamb, Soft Toy, 33483, 5 inches, White
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Adorable Lamb cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Perfect gift for anyone who loves Lambs
description: Product Description This cute little woolly lamb fits in the palm of the hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and squishy. Her body is White with a plump little belly and pink around her face and on her feet. This little lamb has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone she meets. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, Whether it is for A birthday, Christmas or as a 'just because' Gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable little lamb. Directions No specific usage instructions provided. Simply enjoy cuddling and playing with the toy on a tabletop.
